description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Python package that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. Use a single ubuntu-latest job with a matrix strategy to test multiple Python versions (3.6, 3.7, 3.8, 3.9). For each version, check out the repository, set up Python, install dependencies from requirements-dev.txt, build the package with setup.py, and run tests with pytest.
